prompt: A hyper-cinematic parking garage portrait, uploaded face as reference with 100% facial identity preservation, captured from an ultra-low floor-level camera angle between blurred luxury sports cars as the character walks directly toward the lens, wearing a fitted black trench coat over a dark tactical outfit with silver rings and leather gloves, one hand making a realistic finger-gun gesture aimed toward the camera like an intimidating warning, expression cold, fearless, and emotionally detached, harsh white fluorescent garage lights mixed with deep red emergency lights flickering in the background, cinematic rainwater reflections covering the concrete floor, subtle smoke drifting through the frame, strong anamorphic lens flares streaking across the image, dramatic wide-angle distortion emphasizing dominance and power, deep shadows swallowing parts of the environment, shallow depth of field isolating the subject, realistic Kodak Portra 800 film grain, intense action-thriller atmosphere inspired by viral TikTok cinematic edits and neo-noir spy movies.
